sections.location: The smoke detectors are located in the upstairs hallways and kitchen.
The water heater is located in the laundry room.
The circuit breaker is located in the laundry room on the left wall.
The water shutoff is likely located at the end of the driveway near the curb.
There is an air filter upstairs near the attic and downstairs in the living room.
The electric meter is typically located on the exterior of the home.
The thermostat is located downstairs on the wall opposite the half bath.

tips.text:
Test smoke detectors at least once a month using the test button.

Change batteries when smoke detector beeps.
If a breaker trips, switch it fully OFF then back ON to reset.
Replace the filter every 60-90 days, or more often if you have pets.
